# Sociovate — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models and crawlers understand this website.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

# About
Sociovate is an AI automation and agent-building company founded by Rushil Bhor, based in Mumbai, India.
We build AI agents, voice bots, WhatsApp chatbots, outbound calling systems, CRM automations, and MVP SaaS products.
Our clients include enterprise sales teams, fast-growing startups, e-commerce businesses, healthcare clinics, and real estate companies.

# What We Do
- AI Voice Agents: Autonomous calling agents that qualify leads, book appointments, follow up, and handle collections across multiple languages — 24/7 with zero human intervention.
- WhatsApp Chatbots: Multilingual bots that handle customer support, lead qualification, appointment booking, and COD order confirmations via WhatsApp Business API.
- Outbound Calling Agents: Live AI agents handling sales, cold outreach, and debt collection simultaneously across multiple clients.
- CRM & Workflow Automation: n8n-powered backend pipelines, lead nurturing sequences, reminder flows, and business logic integrations.
- MVP & Micro-SaaS Builds: Full-stack product development — React frontends, Node.js backends, auth, dashboards, APIs — shipped fast.
- AI Infrastructure: Backend AI systems, Faster-Whisper transcription, Local LLM deployments, FastAPI services.

# Key Results
- Lead Gen Pipeline: 5x more demos, 92% lead quality, 70% less manual work.
- Shopify Automation: +40% reduction in RTO, 90% high-risk orders blocked.
- WhatsApp Support Bot: 40%+ manpower cost reduction, 24/7 automated support in 3 languages.
- Hair Transplant Clinic: 55% less lead loss, 4x productivity boost.
- Multilingual Outbound: 24/7 active calling, zero human agents, multi-language support.

# Tech Stack
Ultravox, Eleven Labs AI, Faster-Whisper, OpenAI, n8n, Supabase, Node.js, React, FastAPI, Local LLM, WhatsApp Business API, SIP Telephony, Apollo.io, Calendly, MongoDB, Shopify.

# Team
- Rushil Bhor — Founder & CEO. Strategy, AI systems, growth.
- Purva — Founding Engineer. React, Node.js, AI/ML, API development.
- Rutuja — Legal Advisor. IP law, compliance, contracts.
